creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Tue, 29 Aug 2000 11:04:31 +1100, Gregory Bond wrote:

> I think this is the same problem I reported in conf/19509 which has a more 
> detailed repeat-by.

I think so too.  I don't remember installing netscape in the beginning,
or maybe I installed the linux-netscape, which obviously doesn't need
aout support.

This additional detail helps a lot.  Now we need to check whether the
problem persists in 4.1-RELEASE. :-)

Paul, I'm going to close this PR as a duplicate of conf/19509, now that
we know exactly what the problem is.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
